prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot provide financial advice or predict future stock prices with certainty. Stock prices are influenced by numerous unpredictable factors including market sentiment, economic news, company-specific events, and global conditions. My prediction is based on a simplified statistical model assuming the current price as the point estimate for a short-term horizon due to lack of other predictive information. The confidence intervals are calculated using an assumed annualized volatility of 25% (a general estimate for a large-cap stock) and a geometric Brownian motion model. This is a theoretical exercise and not indicative of actual market performance. Real-time market data, company fundamentals, and technical analysis are not factored into this calculation.
